commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ea1e5c82c49ddbbe3461841242e90adb207cd013)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a read-tool-local encoding helper that detects BOMs, tries strict UTF-8, then falls back to GBK before rendering text file contents.

PR surface: Source +133, Tests +72. Total +205 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.6 decode session read-tool text buffers as UTF-8, and a byte probe shows the linked GBK sample becomes replacement characters under UTF-8 but decodes correctly as GBK. I did not run a live Chinese Windows OpenClaw session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is maintainer selection of a canonical branch plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof; automation should not repair this PR while the proof gate remains contributor-owned.

target.title: fix(tools): auto-detect file encoding in read tool for GBK support
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #92664.

The read tool always decoded files as UTF-8, producing garbled text (mojibake) when reading GBK-encoded files common on Chinese Windows.

## What changed

- Added `decodeFileBuffer()` in `src/agents/sessions/tools/encoding.ts` with encoding auto-detection:
  1. Checks for BOM signatures (UTF-8, UTF-16LE, UTF-16BE)
  2. Attempts strict UTF-8 decode via TextDecoder({ fatal: true })
  3. Falls back to GBK (Windows legacy encoding)
  4. Falls back to lenient UTF-8 as final default
- Updated `read.ts` to use `decodeFileBuffer(buffer)` instead of `buffer.toString("utf-8")`
- Updated `Buffer.byteLength` call to use encoding-aware length calculation
- Added tests: GBK file decode, BOM detection (UTF-8/UTF-16LE/UTF-16BE), pure ASCII, valid UTF-8 without BOM, empty buffer

No schema change required — encoding detection is transparent to the model.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Read tool displays garbled text when reading GBK-encoded files on Chinese Windows.

**Real environment tested:** Node v22.19.0, Linux, commit ea1e5c8.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/sessions/tools/read.test.ts
```

**Evidence after fix (terminal capture):**

Test Files  1 passed (1)
     Tests  11 passed (11)
   Start at  22:18:51
   Duration  2.50s

Including 6 new tests for encoding detection: GBK decode, UTF-8 BOM, UTF-16LE BOM, UTF-16BE BOM, pure ASCII, empty buffer.

**Observed result after fix:** All 11 tests pass. GBK-encoded files are correctly decoded. UTF-8 and ASCII files continue to work without regression.

**What was not tested:** Actual Windows GBK codepage scenario (tested on Linux with synthetic GBK buffers). Big5/Shift_JIS legacy encodings beyond GBK fallback.
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt
